Tanks

Class Projectile

  • java.lang.Object
    • Tanks.Projectile

  • public class Projectile
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a projectile in the game. Projectiles are fired by tanks and travel until they collide with terrain or go out of bounds.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Projectile(char name, float x, float y, float vx, float vy, boolean isLargerExplosion)
      Create a new projectile with the given parameters.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean checkTerrainCollision(int[] terrainHeight)
      Checks whether the projectile collides with the terrain.
      void draw(App app)
      Draws the projectile.
      char getName()
      Gets the name of the tank that fired the projectile.
      int getX()
      Gets the current x-coordinate of the projectile.
      int getY()
      Gets the current y-coordinate of the projectile.
      boolean isLargerExplosion()
      Checks whether the projectile causes a larger explosion.
      boolean isOutOfMap()
      Checks if the projectile is out of the map bounds.
      void update(int windSpeed)
      Updates the position of the projectile based on the wind speed.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Projectile

        public Projectile(char name,
                  float x,
                  float y,
                  float vx,
                  float vy,
                  boolean isLargerExplosion)
        Create a new projectile with the given parameters.
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the tank that fired the projectile
        x - the x-coordinate of the projectile
        y - the y-coordinate of the projectile
        vx - the velocity in the x-direction
        vy - the velocity in the y-direction
        isLargerExplosion - indicates whether the projectile causes a larger explosion

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public char getName()
        Gets the name of the tank that fired the projectile.
        Returns:
        the name of the tank

      • getX

        public int getX()
        Gets the current x-coordinate of the projectile.
        Returns:
        the x-coordinate of the projectile

      • getY

        public int getY()
        Gets the current y-coordinate of the projectile.
        Returns:
        the y-coordinate of the projectile

      • isLargerExplosion

        public boolean isLargerExplosion()
        Checks whether the projectile causes a larger explosion.
        Returns:
        true if the projectile causes a larger explosion, false otherwise

      • update

        public void update(int windSpeed)
        Updates the position of the projectile based on the wind speed.
        Parameters:
        windSpeed - the current wind speed

      • checkTerrainCollision

        public boolean checkTerrainCollision(int[] terrainHeight)
        Checks whether the projectile collides with the terrain.
        Parameters:
        terrainHeight - the array that contains terrain heights
        Returns:
        true if the projectile collides with the terrain, false otherwise

      • isOutOfMap

        public boolean isOutOfMap()
        Checks if the projectile is out of the map bounds.
        Returns:
        true if the projectile is out of the map bounds, false otherwise

      • draw

        public void draw(App app)
        Draws the projectile.
        Parameters:
        app - the application instance
